cases.input: Audit an ML scoring platform with source code, deployment config, monitoring screenshots, and SLA thresholds.
cases.expected_behavior: Produce a six-dimension report with evidence-backed findings, severity, remediation, and roadmap.

cases.input: Review a RAG assistant for prompt injection, PII leakage, token budget blindness, and retrieval quality.
cases.expected_behavior: Emphasize security/compliance and GenAI anti-patterns while preserving all six audit dimensions.

cases.input: Audit a pre-production AI system with design docs and tests but no production metrics.
cases.expected_behavior: Mark runtime quality metrics unknown, create evidence gaps, and avoid invented measurements.

cases.input: Audit using architecture diagrams and stakeholder notes only; code access is unavailable.
cases.expected_behavior: Produce a documentation-limited audit with explicit limitations and no code-only claims.

cases.input: Design a new AI platform architecture from scratch.
cases.expected_behavior: Do not activate as the primary skill; route to AI software architecture design instead.

cases.input: Report CRITICAL model drift debt without code, metric, config, doc, interview, or tool evidence.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject or downgrade the finding because it lacks evidence.
Reject the finding because severity must be CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, or INFO.

cases.input: List findings without remediation pattern, dependencies, effort, or Definition of Done.
cases.expected_behavior: Block report completion until remediation fields are present.

cases.input: Claim Training-Serving Skew but omit detection method.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject anti-pattern finding without a detection method and evidence.

cases.input: Validate AI Architecture Audit JSON packet fixtures offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accept valid complete and limited-scope packets; reject missing evidence, invalid severity, missing dimension, missing remediation, and missing threshold packets.
